summary: Preserve stable JSON schemas and chronological ordering across Netlify's local-mirror novel commands while excluding already-expired certificates from the expiring set.
reason: Netlify timestamps may include explicit offsets, and the missing-mirror fallback must match each command's normal result type so agent consumers can decode first-run responses reliably.
validated_outcome: Focused behavior tests cover offset-aware ordering, type-stable missing-mirror JSON, and exclusion of expired certificates.
